title: HTML Fixtures, Fake Transports, Local Servers, Properties, Faults, and Mutation · Language Clinic: Mutation Evidence
summary: Tests hit live websites, fixtures contain one perfect page, retries never fail midway, URL properties are untested, and snapshots pass after a broken selector returns nothing. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the mutation evidence increment in layered deterministic crawler verification suite. Learners progress through predicti…
objectives: Deliberately break selectors, budgets, visited timing, redirect checks, robots precedence, redaction, output escaping, and cleanup and prove tests fail.
Inject DNS, connect, TLS, redirect, truncated body, corrupt encoding, parser, queue, disk, cancellation, browser, and checkpoint failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-mutation-evidence — Deliberately break selectors, budgets, visited timing, redirect checks, robots precedence, redaction, output escaping, and cleanup and prove tests fail.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-testing-fixtures-faults-3
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-testing-fixtures-faults-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance.
def worked_scraper_testing_fixtures_faults_3(fixtures: int = 72, changed_cases: int = 36, injected_faults: int = 18, killed_mutants: int = 16, live_public_requests: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorizationworked3",
        "url5798",
        "response3dekrow",
        "treeworked35798",
        "frontier5798worked3",
        "report3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if fixtures < 24 or changed_cases < 12:
        return False, fixtures, "test-depth"
    if injected_faults < 8:
        return False, injected_faults, "fault-depth"
    if killed_mutants < 8:
        return False, killed_mutants, "mutation-evidence"
    if live_public_requests > 0:
        return False, live_public_requests, "nondeterministic-live-test"
    assert killed_mutants >= 8 and live_public_requests == 0
    return True, killed_mutants, "layered-crawler-verification"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-mutation-evidence-vk21tf
# Competency: scraper-mutation-evidence.
# Case 2925: a clean package and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict.
def evidence_scraper_mutation_evidence_vk21tf(fixtures: int = 72, changed_cases: int = 36, injected_faults: int = 18, killed_mutants: int = 16, live_public_requests: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_vk21tf = "vk21tf-ft12kv-2925"
    assert evidence_variant_vk21tf
    evidence_axes_vk21tf = (
        "authorizationvk21tf",
        "url2925",
        "responseft12kv",
        "treevk21tf2925",
        "frontier2925vk21tf",
        "reportft12kv2925",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_vk21tf)) == 6
    if fixtures < 24 or changed_cases < 12:
        return False, fixtures, "test-depth"
    if injected_faults < 8:
        return False, injected_faults, "fault-depth"
    if killed_mutants < 8:
        return False, killed_mutants, "mutation-evidence"
    if live_public_requests > 0:
        return False, live_public_requests, "nondeterministic-live-test"
    assert killed_mutants >= 8 and live_public_requests == 0
    return True, killed_mutants, "layered-crawler-verification"
